--- memory ---
GpuSortExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=32
  GpuProjectExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=32
    CrossJoinExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=32
      GpuProjectExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
        GpuAggregateExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
          GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
            GpuAggregateExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
              GpuProjectExec: row_width=1, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
